meaning: n.本色平纹棉布 无光上浆衬里布
examples: Celtic winger Shaun Maloney switched to Wigan Athletic for an undisclosed fee.
Wigan look set to complete the signing of Hamilton midfielder James McArthur. (PA).
We will of course [rotate for Wigan], I have to now and will do it in every single game.
Manchester Community Transport (MCT) stopped all Maytree Travel services in Bolton and Wigan at about 14:00 BST.
Wigan boss Chris Hutchings confirmed Everton's recent interest, but insisted no deal had been agreed.
